reviews.comment:
Siempre hice uso de dicha estación (ACA POSADAS) hasta el día 14/01/21 cuando me llenaron el tanque con agua sucia mezclada con súper. Informé a la gerencia sobre lo que les estaba pasando sin ánimos de nada raro solo informar,  y me destrataron a lo cual simplemente perdieron un cliente habitual usuario de varios servicios.

(Translated by Google)
I always used that station (ACA POSADAS) until January 14, 2021, when they filled my tank with dirty water mixed with super gasoline. I informed management about what was happening, not wanting to cause any trouble, just to report it, and they treated me badly, which meant they lost a regular customer who used several of their services.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OXZTLXVnRRAB
